5. reproduction of gene expression analysis - 4 datasets

Author

Weronika Oprzędek

Part 1 of datasets - combined species analysis

This code aims to repeat and extend PCA and UMAP analyses from H. Zhou, R. Shu, C. Zhang, Y. Xiao, D. Jing, J. Tang, Z. Cao, X. Chen, Y. Mei, and F. Li, “Developmental correspondence of juvenile stages across the locust, harlequin ladybird, and diamondback moth,” (iScience, vol. 27, no. 10, p. 110898, Oct. 2024, doi: 10.1016/j.isci.2024.110898) on the same datasets

matrix

load data

read previously prepared gene expression counts

locusta_counts <- readRDS("/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/locusta_counts.rds")
harmonia_counts <- readRDS("/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/harmonia_counts.rds")
plutella_counts <- readRDS("/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/plutella_counts.rds")
drosophila_counts <- readRDS("/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila_counts.rds")

read orthogroups files

orthogroups <- read_tsv("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/proteins/OrthoFinder/Results_May15/Orthogroups/Orthogroups.tsv")
Rows: 19429 Columns: 5

single_copy <- read_lines("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/proteins/OrthoFinder/Results_May15/Orthogroups/Orthogroups_SingleCopyOrthologues.txt")

#in this file i can check for each gene to which orthogroup does it belong

[1] "OG0005893" "OG0005894" "OG0005895" "OG0005897" "OG0005898" "OG0005899"

orthofinder

making matrix with SRR IDs as columns and orthogroups as rows, so for each gene with counts I sum them into orthogroup

#list of dataframes with counts (per RNA-seq dataset)
all_counts <- list(
  locusta = locusta_counts,
  harmonia = harmonia_counts,
  plutella = plutella_counts,
  drosophila = drosophila_counts
)

#combine all counts tables into one long table
#rows: all gene names; columns: all SRR and species; values: counts 
all_counts_long <- lapply(names(all_counts), function(species) {
  df <- all_counts[[species]]
  df$gene_id <- rownames(df)
  df$species <- species
  df
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

head(all_counts_long)

orthoSNAP

#orthosnap -> found additional 1:1 orthogroups

snap_files <- list.files("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/proteins/OrthoFinder/Results_May15/output_snap_ogs/", pattern = "\\.fa$", full.names = TRUE)

#read files and extract gene IDs
snap_orthologs <- lapply(snap_files, function(file) {
  fasta <- readAAStringSet(file)
  genes <- names(fasta)
  
  tibble(
    orthogroup = str_remove(basename(file), "\\.fa.orthosnap.0.fa$"),
    gene_id = str_replace(genes, "^.*?_", "") %>%
          str_replace("\\..*", "")
  )
}) %>% bind_rows()

#merge with expression counts
snap_expr <- snap_orthologs %>%
  inner_join(all_counts_long, by = "gene_id")

#sum gene counts into orthogroups
orthosnap_counts <- snap_expr %>%
  select(-gene_id, -species) %>%
  group_by(orthogroup) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "orthogroup")
#table: orthogroup, species, gene
orthogroup_mapping <- orthogroups %>%
  pivot_longer(-Orthogroup, names_to = "species", values_to = "genes") %>%
  filter(!is.na(genes)) %>%
  separate_rows(genes, sep = ",") %>%
  mutate(
    genes = str_trim(genes),
    species = str_replace(species, "_proteins", ""),
    genes = str_replace(genes, "\\..*", "") 
  )

orthogroup_mapping %>%
  count(species)
# A tibble: 4 × 2
  species        n
  <chr>      <int>
1 drosophila 11268
2 harmonia   17855
3 locusta    91040
4 plutella   22808
#numbers of genes in orthogroups (based on used genome anotations)
head(orthogroup_mapping)
# A tibble: 6 × 3
  Orthogroup species genes  
  <chr>      <chr>   <chr>  
1 OG0000000  locusta g100070
2 OG0000000  locusta g100395
3 OG0000000  locusta g100486
4 OG0000000  locusta g100511
5 OG0000000  locusta g100635
6 OG0000000  locusta g101235
#join count data with orthogroup mapping
merged <- all_counts_long %>%
  inner_join(orthogroup_mapping, by = c("gene_id" = "genes"))

#deleting columns with species, gene ids
#summing counts for each  orthogroup
orthogroup_counts <- merged %>%
  select(-c("gene_id", "species.x", "species.y")) %>%
  group_by(Orthogroup) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)))

#narrow to only 1:1 orthogroups
orthogroup_counts_1to1 <- orthogroup_counts %>%
  filter(rownames(.) %in% single_copy)

#check if anything overlaps between 1:1 from orthofinder and orthosnap (no)
overlapping_genes <- intersect(rownames(orthogroup_counts_1to1), rownames(orthosnap_counts))

length(overlapping_genes)
[1] 0
print(overlapping_genes)
character(0)
#add orthosnap
combined_counts <- bind_rows(
  orthogroup_counts_1to1,
  orthosnap_counts[!rownames(orthosnap_counts) %in% rownames(orthogroup_counts_1to1), ]
)

combined_counts[is.na(combined_counts)] <- 0

deseq2

#read metadata: Stage, Replicate, Sample.name, Species, Stage2, Sample2
#_2 are generalized names across all datasets / across replicates
metadata <- read.csv(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/metadata2.csv", row.names = 1, header = TRUE, sep = ",") %>%
  filter(Species != "blatella")

metadata <- metadata[colnames(orthogroup_counts), ]

head(metadata)
                 Stage Replicate Sample.name Species Stage2 Sample2   Batch
SRR24633459 5th instar         3     Lm-N5-3 locusta  Nymph   Lm-N5 locusta
SRR24633460 5th instar         2     Lm-N5-2 locusta  Nymph   Lm-N5 locusta
SRR24633461 5th instar         1     Lm-N5-1 locusta  Nymph   Lm-N5 locusta
SRR24633462 4th instar         3     Lm-N4-3 locusta  Nymph   Lm-N4 locusta
SRR24633463 4th instar         2     Lm-N4-2 locusta  Nymph   Lm-N4 locusta
SRR24633464 4th instar         1     Lm-N4-1 locusta  Nymph   Lm-N4 locusta
dim(metadata)
[1] 117   7
#differential expression + deseq2 data formatting
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = combined_counts,
                              colData = metadata,
                              design = ~ Stage2)
Warning in DESeqDataSet(se, design = design, ignoreRank): some variables in
design formula are characters, converting to factors
#fit the model and estimate differential expression
dds <- DESeq(dds)
estimating size factors
estimating dispersions
gene-wise dispersion estimates
mean-dispersion relationship
final dispersion estimates
fitting model and testing
-- replacing outliers and refitting for 5 genes
-- DESeq argument 'minReplicatesForReplace' = 7 
-- original counts are preserved in counts(dds)
estimating dispersions
fitting model and testing
head(results(dds, tidy=TRUE))
        row  baseMean log2FoldChange     lfcSE      stat       pvalue
1 OG0005893 2455.6340      2.4210356 0.4987476  4.854230 1.208554e-06
2 OG0005894  546.7055     -0.7866249 0.1495625 -5.259505 1.444434e-07
3 OG0005895  650.7256      1.7375497 0.2149065  8.085141 6.209250e-16
4 OG0005897  552.0861      2.6562792 0.4020544  6.606765 3.928087e-11

          padj

LFC < 0 (down)     : 315, 29%

patterns visualisation

pca

#variance-stabilizing transformation (reduces dependence of variance on mean expression)
vst <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds, blind = FALSE)
vst_mat <- assay(vst)

#get metadata
sample_info <- as.data.frame(colData(vst))
sample_info$Sample <- rownames(sample_info)
sample_info <- sample_info %>% select(Sample, Sample2, Stage2, Species)

#rows: samples; columns: genes
vst_df <- as.data.frame(t(vst_mat))
vst_df$Sample <- rownames(vst_df)
#add metadata
vst_df <- left_join(vst_df, sample_info, by = "Sample")

#median on replicates (before pca)
vst_median <- vst_df %>%
  group_by(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median), .groups = "drop")

#prepare for pca
expr_median <- vst_median %>% select(-Stage2, -Species)
samples <- vst_median$Sample2
expr_values <- vst_median %>% select(-Sample2, -Stage2, -Species)

exprs_mat <- t(as.matrix(expr_values))
colnames(exprs_mat) <- vst_median$Sample2
rownames(exprs_mat) <- colnames(expr_values)
exprs_mat <- t(exprs_mat)

#ExpressionSet object
pheno <- AnnotatedDataFrame(data.frame(Sample = colnames(exprs_mat),
                                       row.names = colnames(exprs_mat)))
eset <- ExpressionSet(assayData = exprs_mat, phenoData = pheno)

#standardize (mean = 0, sd = 1)
eset_std <- standardise(eset)
expr_scaled <- exprs(eset_std)

#principal component analysis
pca <- prcomp(expr_scaled)
#explained variance
percentVar <- round(100 * (pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2)), 1)

#plot
pcaData <- as.data.frame(pca$x)
pcaData$Sample2 <- vst_median$Sample2
pcaData$Stage2 <- vst_median$Stage2
pcaData$Species <- vst_median$Species

stages_order <- c("Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa")
stage_colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(stages_order) + 4)[5:(length(stages_order) + 4)], stages_order)

p <- ggplot(pcaData, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) +
  ggtitle("PCA of gene expression  (original data)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )+
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_colors)+
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "drosophila" = 16,
      "plutella" = 15,
      "locusta" = 3,
      "harmonia" = 7
    ),
    labels = c(
      "drosophila" = expression(italic("D. melanogaster")),
      "plutella" = expression(italic("P. xylostella")),
      "locusta" = expression(italic("L. migratoria")),
      "harmonia" = expression(italic("H. axyridis"))
    )
  )

print(p)
#save PNG
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/PCA1_stage_species.png",
       p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

heatmap

#annotations
annotation_df <- vst_median %>%
  select(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  rename(Stage = Stage2) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Sample2")

species_labels <- c(
  "drosophila" = "D. melanogaster",
  "harmonia"   = "H. axyridis",
  "locusta"    = "L. migratoria",
  "plutella"   = "P. xylostella"
)

#change species names acording to map above
annotation_df$Species <- species_labels[ as.character(annotation_df$Species) ]
annotation_df$Species <- factor(annotation_df$Species, levels = unname(species_labels))


#different colours for species
species_levels <- unique(annotation_df$Species)
species_colors <- setNames(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = max(3, length(species_levels)), "Set1")[1:length(species_levels)],
  species_levels
)

stages_order <- c("Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa")
annotation_df$Stage <- factor(annotation_df$Stage, levels = stages_order)

annotation_colors <- list(
  Stage = stage_colors,
  Species = species_colors
)

heat_colors <- colorRampPalette(rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")))(100)

#heatmap: columns: samples; rows: orthogroups; values: standardised gene expression
ph <- pheatmap(t(expr_scaled),
         scale = "row",
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
         clustering_method = "ward.D2",
         annotation_col = annotation_df,
         annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
         show_rownames = FALSE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_col = 8,
         fontsize = 12,
         border_color = NA,
         angle_col = 45,
         main = "Heatmap of gene expression  (original data)",
         color = heat_colors
         )
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(ph$gtable)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pheatmap1_all_samples.png", ph, width = 11, height = 8)

cluster

#heatmap of differential expression between stages
unique_stages <- levels(dds$Stage2)

#matrix for storing DEG counts between stages
mat <- matrix(0, nrow = length(unique_stages), ncol = length(unique_stages),
              dimnames = list(unique_stages, unique_stages))

#run all pairwise comparisons of DEGs
pairwise_comparisons <- combn(unique_stages, 2, simplify = FALSE)
deg_list <- list()

for (comp in pairwise_comparisons) {
  group1 <- comp[1]
  group2 <- comp[2]

  res <- tryCatch({
    results(dds, contrast = c("Stage2", group1, group2))
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("Contrast", group1, "vs", group2, "failed:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })

  if (!is.null(res)) {
    deg_list[[paste0(group1, "_vs_", group2)]] <- as.data.frame(res)
    n_deg <- sum(res$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)

    mat[group1, group2] <- n_deg
    mat[group2, group1] <- n_deg
  }
}

#heatmap
deg_colors <- colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = 9, name = "Oranges"))(100)

ph <- pheatmap(mat,
         fontsize_row = 10,
         fontsize_col = 10,
         angle_col = 45,
         cellwidth = 20,
         cellheight = 20,
         border_color = NA,
         main = "Number of DEGs between stages",
         color = deg_colors
)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(ph$gtable)

png("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pheatmap1_stage_species.png",
    width = 1000, height = 700, res = 150)

ph <- pheatmap(mat,
         fontsize_row = 10,
         fontsize_col = 10,
         angle_col = 45,
         cellwidth = 20,
         cellheight = 20,
         border_color = NA,
         main = "Number of DEGs between stages\n(original data)",
         color = deg_colors
)
dev.off()
png 
  3

umap

#Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection
#Mfuzz standardise (z-score on orthogroups)
pheno <- AnnotatedDataFrame(data.frame(Sample = colnames(vst_mat),
                                       row.names = colnames(vst_mat)))
eset <- ExpressionSet(assayData = vst_mat, phenoData = pheno)
eset_std <- standardise(eset)
expr_scaled <- exprs(eset_std)

#dataframe with matadata
expr_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_scaled)) 
expr_df$Sample <- colnames(vst_mat) 
sample_info <- as.data.frame(colData(vst)) 
sample_info$Sample <- rownames(sample_info) 
expr_df <- left_join(expr_df, sample_info, by = "Sample") 

#medians
expr_median <- expr_df %>%
  group_by(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median), .groups = "drop")

#UMAP
expr_median_mat <- expr_median %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-Sample2, -Stage2, -Species) %>%
  as.matrix()

#standardise
expr_median_mat <- t(scale(t(expr_median_mat)))

umap_result <- umap(expr_median_mat, n_neighbors = 15, min_dist = 0.1, metric = "euclidean")
umap_df <- as.data.frame(umap_result)
colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
umap_df$Sample2 <- expr_median$Sample2
umap_df$Stage2 <- expr_median$Stage2
umap_df$Species <- expr_median$Species

#plot
p <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  xlab("UMAP1") +
  ylab("UMAP2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  ggtitle("UMAP of gene expression (original data)") +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species") +
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_colors)+
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "drosophila" = 16,
      "plutella" = 15,
      "locusta" = 3,
      "harmonia" = 7
    ),
    labels = c(
      "drosophila" = expression(italic("D. melanogaster")),
      "plutella" = expression(italic("P. xylostella")),
      "locusta" = expression(italic("L. migratoria")),
      "harmonia" = expression(italic("H. axyridis"))
    )
  )

print(p)
#save PNG
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/UMAP1_stage_species.png",
       p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

remove species effect

pca 2

# VST
vst <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds, blind = FALSE)
vst_mat <- assay(vst)

#linear model to delete the species effect
residuals_mat <- apply(vst_mat, 1, function(x) {
  lm(x ~ colData(vst)$Species)$residuals
})
residuals_mat <- t(residuals_mat)

sample_info <- as.data.frame(colData(vst))
sample_info$Sample <- rownames(sample_info)
sample_info <- sample_info %>% select(Sample, Sample2, Stage2, Species)

#data.frame residuals + Sample
residuals_df <- as.data.frame(t(residuals_mat))
residuals_df$Sample <- rownames(residuals_df)
residuals_df <- left_join(residuals_df, sample_info, by = "Sample")

#median for each Sample2/Stage2
residuals_median <- residuals_df %>%
  group_by(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median), .groups = "drop")

expr_median <- residuals_median %>% select(-Stage2, -Species)
samples <- expr_median$Sample2
expr_values <- expr_median %>% select(-Sample2)
exprs_mat <- t(as.matrix(expr_values))
colnames(exprs_mat) <- expr_median$Sample2
rownames(exprs_mat) <- colnames(expr_values)
exprs_mat <- t(exprs_mat)

#standardize Mfuzz
pheno <- AnnotatedDataFrame(data.frame(Sample = colnames(exprs_mat), row.names = colnames(exprs_mat)))
eset <- ExpressionSet(assayData = exprs_mat, phenoData = pheno)
eset_std <- standardise(eset)
expr_scaled <- exprs(eset_std)

#PCA
pca <- prcomp(expr_scaled)
percentVar <- round(100 * (pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2)), 1)

pcaData <- as.data.frame(pca$x)
pcaData$Sample2 <- residuals_median$Sample2
pcaData$Stage2 <- residuals_median$Stage2
pcaData$Species <- residuals_median$Species

p <- ggplot(pcaData, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) +
  ggtitle("PCA of gene expression (original data, removed species effect)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")+
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_colors)+
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "drosophila" = 16,
      "plutella" = 15,
      "locusta" = 3,
      "harmonia" = 7
    ),
    labels = c(
      "drosophila" = "D. melanogaster",
      "plutella" = "P. xylostella",
      "locusta" = "L. migratoria",
      "harmonia" = "H. axyridis"
    )
  )

print(p)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/PCA1_stage.png",
       p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

heatmap 2

#annotations
annotation_df <- residuals_median %>%
  select(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  rename(Stage = Stage2) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Sample2")

#change species names to full
annotation_df$Species <- species_labels[ as.character(annotation_df$Species) ]
annotation_df$Species <- factor(annotation_df$Species, levels = unname(species_labels))

#different colours for species
species_levels <- unique(annotation_df$Species)
species_colors <- setNames(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = max(3, length(species_levels)), "Set1")[1:length(species_levels)],
  species_levels
)

stages_order <- c("Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa")
annotation_df$Stage <- factor(annotation_df$Stage, levels = stages_order)
stage_colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(stages_order) + 4)[5:(length(stages_order) + 4)], stages_order)


annotation_colors <- list(
  Stage = stage_colors,
  Species = species_colors
)

ph <- pheatmap(t(expr_scaled),
         scale = "row",
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
         clustering_method = "ward.D2",
         annotation_col = annotation_df,
         annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
         show_rownames = FALSE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_col = 8,
         fontsize = 12,
         border_color = NA,
         angle_col = 45,
         main = "Heatmap of gene expression\n(original data, removed species effect)",
         color = heat_colors
         )
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(ph$gtable)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/heatmap1_stage.png", ph, width = 12, height = 8)

umap 2

vst <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds, blind = FALSE)
vst_mat <- assay(vst)

# residuals for species
residuals_mat <- t(apply(vst_mat, 1, function(x) {
  lm(x ~ colData(vst)$Species)$residuals
}))
#scaling
expr_scaled <- t(scale(t(residuals_mat)))

expr_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_scaled))
expr_df$Sample <- colnames(vst_mat)

sample_info <- as.data.frame(colData(vst))
sample_info$Sample <- rownames(sample_info)

expr_df <- left_join(expr_df, sample_info, by = "Sample")

#medians
expr_median <- expr_df %>%
  group_by(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median), .groups = "drop")


#UMAP
expr_median_mat <- expr_median %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-Sample2, -Stage2, -Species) %>%
  as.matrix()

#standardise
expr_median_mat <- t(scale(t(expr_median_mat)))

umap_result <- umap(expr_median_mat, n_neighbors = 15, min_dist = 0.1, metric = "euclidean")
umap_df <- as.data.frame(umap_result)
colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
umap_df$Sample2 <- expr_median$Sample2
umap_df$Stage2 <- expr_median$Stage2
umap_df$Species <- expr_median$Species

#plot
p <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  xlab("UMAP 1") +
  ylab("UMAP 2") +
  ggtitle("UMAP of gene expression (original data, removed species effect)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")+
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_colors)+
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "drosophila" = 16,
      "plutella" = 15,
      "locusta" = 3,
      "harmonia" = 7
    ),
    labels = c(
      "drosophila" = "D. melanogaster",
      "plutella" = "P. xylostella",
      "locusta" = "L. migratoria",
      "harmonia" = "H. axyridis"
    )
  )

print(p)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/UMAP1_stage.png",
       p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
